transfer.heading: Send money in seconds
transfer.subtitle: Pay anyone instantly and securely — just tell me who and how much.
transfer.sendToContactSend: I want to send money to one of my contacts.
transfer.payNewPayeeSend: Help me set up and pay a new payee.
transfer.checkLimitsSend: What are my current transfer limits?

cards.heading: Manage your cards
cards.subtitle: Freeze, replace, or fine-tune the controls on your card.
cards.replaceSend: I need to order a replacement card.
cards.controlsSend: I want to adjust my card spending controls.

savings.heading: Grow your savings
savings.subtitle: Track goals and build the habit.
savings.newGoalSend: I want to open a new savings goal.
savings.autoSaveSend: Help me set up a recurring auto-save transfer.
savings.projectSend: How long until I reach my savings goal?

security.heading: You're protected
security.subtitle: No suspicious activity detected. I can act fast if anything looks off.
security.statusBanner: Account status: secure · last checked just now
security.reviewSend: Show me my recent account activity.
security.reportSend: I want to report a suspicious transaction.

docs.subtitle: A living reference for everything an assistant reply can render — and a playground to try it yourself.

insightCards.heading: Insight Cards
insightCards.blurb: The mobile AI insight card (the `mobileAiInsight` remote's `insightCard` block), one row per widget. Expand a row to preview the card in all four layout variants — hero, wide, tall and compact. Only hero and wide render the widget; tall and compact are introText-only.
insightCards.empty: No insight-card examples were published by the remote.

bento.fixToPreview: Fix the errors to see a preview.
bento.remoteHint: Start it with `npm run remote:mobile-ai` (or `npm run dev:docs`), then reload.
